# System Identity Domains

**API Collection**

Set or obtain a system identity for domains.

## Overview

These constants can be used with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecIdentitySetSystemIdentity(_:_:)] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecIdentityCopySystemIdentity(_:_:_:)] functions.

## Constants

- **kSecIdentityDomainDefault**: The system-wide default identity.
- **kSecIdentityDomainKerberosKDC**: Kerberos Key Distribution Center (KDC) identity.
title: System Identity Domains
